en.value: 1.1 Distribution of educational materials to students 1.2 Conduct tutorial classes for low performing students in grades 8 to 10 1.3 Conduct program for recognizing students with the most improvement in attendance and marks. 1.4 Train Child Club (CC) members and focal teachers on leadership and CC management including child rights and protection 1.5 Provide basic materials for Child Club for their activities1.6 CC organize interaction meetings and awareness raising with students and community members on the importance of education, health and child rights, protection and Child Abuse Prevention to develop Child friendly schools Child Protection Policy 1.7 Gathering of Child Clubs and advocacy forum in the Rural Municipality 1.8 Provide hygiene kit for students and teachers 2.1 Classroom construction 2.2 Classroom management 2.3 Provide furniture and equipment for 3 science lab in 3 schools.2.4 Provide furniture and books for libraries 2.5 Install playground equipment 2.6 Construction of toilet facilities 3-doors block 2.7 Construction of drinking water facility with 4 taps in 6 schools and water intake tank in 1 school3.1.
